description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a rounded top. It features a prominent black hose attached near the top, which curves downward and ends in a conical nozzle. The top section includes a red handle and lever mechanism, along with a visible safety pin and a small metallic fitting. A large, rectangular instruction label with pictograms and text is affixed to the front of the cylinder, providing usage guidance. The extinguisher's surface is smooth and glossy, with the hose and nozzle made of black rubber or plastic. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for quick access and operation in emergency situations.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose and nozzle, a labeled front, and a metallic handle mechanism on top. The surface is smooth and glossy, with clear emergency instructions visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instruction label, handle, safety pin, and the black hose with nozzle hanging to the side.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red back of the cylinder, with the hose and label mostly out of sight.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the full length of the black hose and nozzle, as well as the smooth red body.
description_view_3: Direct view of the hose and nozzle from behind, with the handle and top mechanism visible above.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large rectangular instruction label with pictograms and text is present on the front of the cylinder, mostly white with black and red details.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, approximately the length of the cylinder, ending in a conical black nozzle; the hose hangs freely.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle, secured with a small red component.
